name: community-screen
description: Foundry VTT v14 module: drive a shared TV at the table from the GM laptop.

scripts.check:syntax: node --check scripts/main.mjs && node --check scripts/module.mjs && node --check scripts/settings.mjs && node --check scripts/identity.mjs && node --check scripts/sockets.mjs && node --check scripts/ui-hiding.mjs && node --check scripts/canvas-lock.mjs && node --check scripts/scene-fit.mjs && node --check scripts/ownership.mjs && node --check scripts/vision.mjs && node --check scripts/popups.mjs && node --check scripts/push-buttons.mjs && node --check scripts/keybindings.mjs && node --check scripts/scene-follow.mjs && node --check scripts/combat-highlight.mjs && node --check scripts/combat-hud.mjs && node --check scripts/control-palette.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/logger.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/helpers.mjs
scripts.check:manifest: node -e "const m=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('module.json','utf8')); if(!m.id||!m.esmodules||!m.compatibility)throw new Error('module.json missing required fields'); console.log('module.json OK: '+m.id+' v'+m.version);"
scripts.check: npm run check:manifest && npm run check:syntax && npm run lint && npm run test
